questions.question_text_full: Select the correct passive form of the given sentence. Why did the editor give such a rude comment?

options.text: Why had such a rude comment been given by the editor?
Why is such a rude comment being given by the editor?
Why was such an editor given by the rude comment?
Why was such a rude comment given by the editor?

questions.correct_option_text: Why was such a rude comment given by the editor?

questions.question_text_full: Select the most appropriate indirect form of the given sentence. Mother said to me, “Will you help me in cleaning the house?”

options.text: Mother asked me if you would help her in cleaning the house.
Mother asked me will you help me in cleaning the house.
Mother told me that I should help her in cleaning the house.
Mother asked me if I would help her in cleaning the house.

questions.correct_option_text: Mother asked me if I would help her in cleaning the house.

questions.question_text_full: Select the most appropriate indirect form of the given sentence. The professor said to Piyush, “Will you clean the data and get back to me tomorrow?”

options.text: The professor told Piyush clean the data and get back to him the next day.
The professor asked Piyush if he would clean the data and get back to him the next day.
The professor asked Piyush will you clean the data and get back to me tomorrow.
The professor ordered Piyush that he should clean the data and get back to him the next day.

questions.correct_option_text: The professor asked Piyush if he would clean the data and get back to him the next day.

questions.question_text_full: Select the most appropriate word for the given group of words. Medical doctors who specialise in diagnosing diseases using X-rays, CT scans and ultrasound
